headline: Byzantine Empire
description: The Byzantine Empire (Eastern Roman Empire, 330-1453 CE) preserved Greco-Roman knowledge through the Middle Ages. Capital: Constantinople (founded 330 by Constantine). Orthodox Christianity, Greek language, Roman law (Justinian's Code, 529). Hagia Sophia (537, world's largest cathedral for 1000 years). Fell to Ottoman Turks (1453).

citation.name: Byzantium: The Surprising Life of a Medieval Empire (Judith Herrin)
